query: SELECT id, liverId, streamerName, livestreamDate, salesAmount, gmv, duration FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%三宅%' OR streamerName LIKE '%あゆみ%' OR streamerName LIKE '%Sannana%';
